author: christopher

transcript.text: Pretty well! It's a beautiful day out there in Farmington   80 degrees and mostly sunny in late March is a gift. Hope you're getting a chance to enjoy it.  I don't know much about your garden yet. Whenever you're ready to walk me through it, just run `!setup` and we'll get started   one bed at a time.
Yep, loud and clear! Text works great. If you ever want to drop a voice note, that works too   just upload the audio file and I'll transcribe and process it.  What's on your mind?

raw_transcript:
USER: Hey, how's it going?
SLARTI: Pretty well! It's a beautiful day out there in Farmington   80 degrees and mostly sunny in late March is a gift. Hope you're getting a chance to enjoy it.  I don't know much about your garden yet. Whenever you're ready to walk me through it, just run `!setup` and we'll get started   one bed at a time.
USER: Can you hear me?
SLARTI: Yep, loud and clear! Text works great. If you ever want to drop a voice note, that works too   just upload the audio file and I'll transcribe and process it.  What's on your mind?
